title: Browser Automation (TMWebDriver)

classes.name: Session
methods: is_active() -> bool  — checks disconnect_at; auto-marks disconnected if http + stale >60s
reconnect(client, info) -> None  — reassigns ws_client or http_queue, resets connect_at
mark_disconnected() -> None  — sets disconnect_at = time.time()

classes.name: TMWebDriver
methods: __init__(host='127.0.0.1', port=18765)  — detects remote, starts WS + HTTP servers or sets remote URL
start_ws_server() -> None  — creates WebSocketServer with inner JSExecutor class, runs in daemon thread
start_http_server() -> None  — creates Bottle app with /api/longpoll, /api/result, /link routes; runs in daemon thread via _T/_H
clean_sessions() -> None  — deletes sessions inactive >600s
_register_client(session_id, client, session_info) -> None  — creates or reconnects Session; updates default/latest ids
_unregister_client(client: WebSocket) -> None  — marks session disconnected by ws_client reference
execute_js(code, timeout=15, session_id=None) -> Any  — dispatches JS to browser tab (ws/ext_ws sends via ws_client; http puts to queue); polls self.results; handles timeout/reload edge cases
_remote_cmd(cmd: dict) -> dict  — POSTs to remote /link endpoint via requests
get_all_sessions() -> list  — returns active session dicts (remote-aware)
get_session_dict() -> dict  — {id: url} from get_all_sessions()
find_session(url_pattern: str) -> list  — returns [(id, info)] for active sessions matching URL substring
set_session(url_pattern: str) -> str | None  — sets default_session_id to first match (remote-aware)
jump(url, timeout=10) -> Any  — execute_js window.location.href
newtab(url=None) -> Any  — execute_js GM_openInTab

classes.name: JSExecutor
classes.note: Inner class; captures outer TMWebDriver instance as 'driver'
methods: handle() -> None  — parses JSON msg; dispatches: 'ready' → driver._register_client; 'ext_ready'/'tabs_update' → sync ext_ws sessions; 'ack' → driver.acks; 'result'/'error' → driver.results
connected() -> None  — no-op (print string not called)
handle_close() -> None  — calls driver._unregister_client(self)

classes.name: _T
classes.note: Threaded WSGI server for the HTTP gateway

classes.name: _H
methods: log_request(*a) -> None  — suppresses HTTP access logs

relationships: TMWebDriver composes Session (1..*) via self.sessions dict
TMWebDriver creates JSExecutor class (inner/factory — passed to WebSocketServer as handler class)
key_patterns: Dual-mode: runs as local server (WS + HTTP) or as a remote proxy client (is_remote flag)
Three session transport types: 'ws' (direct WebSocket), 'ext_ws' (browser extension WebSocket, shared single WS), 'http' (long-poll queue)
execute_js uses UUID-keyed result dict + polling loop with ACK tracking and timeout logic
clean_sessions() removes stale sessions (>10 min disconnected)
HTTP gateway (/link) proxies get_all_sessions, find_session, execute_js for remote callers
http_routes: POST /api/longpoll  — browser long-poll; registers http sessions; blocks up to 5s for a queued command
POST /api/result  — browser posts execution result/error back
POST /link  — remote control gateway: execute_js, get_all_sessions, find_session
external_dependencies: BeautifulSoup (imported but not used in this file)
